IEEE-TITLE-001.section: Safe edit policy / title case protection
IEEE-TITLE-001.basis: BibTeX case-changing styles require braces around confirmed acronyms and system names.

IEEE-SYNTAX-004.basis: Known field names are normalized to lowercase without changing their values or order.
